sections.paragraph:
Original: בּד

Transliteration: bad

Phonetic: bad

BDB Definition:

  1. alone, by itself, besides, a part, separation, being alone
    1. separation, alone, by itself
      1. only (adverb)
      2. apart from, besides (preposition)
    2. part
    3. parts (eg limbs, shoots), bars

Origin: from H909

TWOT entry: 201a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
